flags.what: The middle 'Focus' tier carries an 'Our pick' badge — the common badge-on-the-middle-tier pricing pattern. Kept deliberately: it is an honest maker's recommendation, not false social proof, and is part of the approved design.
flags.fix: Optional: attach a concrete reason to the recommendation, or leave as-is since it reads honestly.

recommendation: On-brand, distinctive work that is token-identical to the existing Cadence landing page and reads as the same product. The one hard flag (the billing-toggle buttons under the 44px mobile touch target) was fixed before handoff. Remaining note is optional/honest. The small clay eyebrow sits at the AA line but is left identical to the landing page's eyebrow, matching the brand exactly as requested.
assessed: current/index.html (pricing page) + web/cadence/index.html (brand reference) + snapshot render; dark mode read from token source. RESPONSIVE-3 (billing-toggle tap target) resolved post-jury by adding the toggle to the coarse-pointer 44px rule.
